name: Kindergarten Nutrition & Food Science — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for food groups, senses, hunger/fullness cues, and handwashing. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with food groups, senses, hunger/fullness cues, and handwashing.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about food groups, senses, hunger/fullness cues, and handwashing through a close look at food groups, senses, hunger/fullness cues, and handwashing.
